[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ComputedState](../fast-element.computedstate/index.html)

## ComputedState type

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
>

State whose value is computed from other dependencies.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ComputedState<T> = ReadonlyState<T> & Disposable & {
    subscribe(subscriber: Subscriber): void;
    unsubscribe(subscriber: Subscriber): void;
};
```
**References:** [ReadonlyState](../fast-element.readonlystate/)<!-- -->, [Disposable](../fast-element.disposable/)<!-- -->, [Subscriber](../fast-element.subscriber/)
